content.en:
"Black Desolate Dao Ancestor, you continue to guard here, I'll go back to the Heavenly Emperor Palace first and discuss with the three palace masters!"

Styx Emperor Road.

"Yes!"

The Black Wilderness Dao Ancestor should answer the road.

......

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

After the Styx Emperor returned, he immediately found the Blue Dragon Palace Lord, the White Tiger Palace Lord, and the True Martial Palace Lord.

Heavenly Emperor Palace, Heavenly Emperor Palace.

The Emperor of the Styx River saw the three palace masters and said, "Three palace masters, just now I went to investigate the situation on the side of the Dark Forbidden Domain and found the Forbidden Zerg!"

"Are you sure it's a forbidden zerg?"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord frowned.

"Yes!" the Styx Emperor affirmed, "I've seen many Forbidden Zerg, and I've also seen a Commander-level Forbidden Zerg!"

"It's right not to look for it, otherwise you won't be able to come back if you encounter a lord-level forbidden zerg!"

The main road of the Qinglong Palace.

"What should we do now, are we going to attack that forbidden Zerg lair in the Heavenly Emperor Palace?" asked the Styx Emperor.

"Of course it can't be!" "True Martial Palace Lord shook his head, "If our Heavenly Emperor Palace attacks the Forbidden Zerg Lair, I'm afraid we will suffer heavy losses, and when the time comes, maybe we will fight it out, and it will only cheapen other forces." Besides, the Forbidden Zerg threatens the entire Dao Mountain Realm, why should our Heavenly Emperor Palace fight the Forbidden Zerg? We established that small world to project the coordinates of the Forbidden Realm in the future, not to prevent the Forbidden Zerg. In this case, we will consult with other forces, and each force must send a certain number of men to wage war against the Forbidden Zerg on the edge of the Dark Forbidden Realm. In this case, there will be losses, and everyone will lose. "

The White Tiger Palace Lord, who didn't speak, suddenly spoke: "Actually, the appearance of the Forbidden Zerg is a good thing for the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!"

"A good thing? What is this a good thing?"

The True Martial Palace Master was puzzled.

The White Tiger Palace Lord explained: "Don't forget, the Forbidden Zerg is also a pseudo-forbidden creature, this creature is of great benefit to the birth of the Forbidden Realm, if we sacrifice a large number of Forbidden Zerg, we can definitely promote the birth of the Forbidden Realm, and the success rate will definitely be much greater, which is much more cost-effective than killing some Dao Ancestors." Killing Dao Ancestor caused other forces to resist, and the gains outweighed the losses. We can kill the Forbidden Zerg, and there are other forces to help us kill them, which can be described as killing two birds with one stone!"

When the Qinglong Palace Lord and the True Martial Palace Master heard this, they immediately felt that this suggestion was very good.

The ultimate goal of the Heavenly Emperor Palace is to make the Xuanxu Ancient Realm become a forbidden realm, and although the success rate is very high at present, the time spent is too long, if you can sacrifice a large number of forbidden zergs, then you can increase the success rate, and you can also shorten the time.

Moreover, sacrificing the Forbidden Zerg to the origin of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm can completely obtain benefits from the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, such as obtaining a part of the power of the Xuanxu Origin to improve strength, obtain cultivation amplification, and so on.

In short, there are many benefits!

"If it's a sacrifice to the Forbidden Zerg, then our Heavenly Emperor Palace will have to make a good contribution this time!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord said with a smile.

The White Tiger Palace Lord and the True Martial Palace Lord also nodded in agreement.

Of course, it is also necessary to let other forces intercept the Forbidden Zerg, otherwise it will be difficult for the forces of the Heavenly Emperor Palace alone to resist, and they will not be able to bear such losses.

Next, the Heavenly Emperor Palace contacted the three forces of the Mitian Sect, the Tianhai Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple, and also contacted the Black Wind Mountain.

As for the other forces, the Heavenly Emperor Palace did not contact them.

They didn't bother to contact those ant-like forces, anyway, in the future, the three Nine Heavens forces could contact other forces, and there was no need for them to contact them.

For the Heavenly Emperor Palace to take the initiative to contact them, the three Nine Heavens forces and the Black Wind Mountain were very curious, but they still came.

A void in the Void Ancient Realm.

The incarnation of a half-step domain ancestor descended.

The three palace masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace all arrived, the three half-step domain ancestors of the three major Nine Heaven Forces also came, and the Eternal Dao Ancestors and Divine Ruins Dao Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain also came.

The eight half-step domain ancestors discussed together, what an important thing this was.

When the personnel arrived, the Migu Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect opened his mouth and asked, "Qinglong Palace Master, what is the so-called matter of your Heavenly Emperor Palace contacting us?"

Then.

The Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace conjured up a picture, which was the picture seen by the Emperor of the Styx River and the Black Desolate Dao Ancestor.

The picture shows a Forbidden Zerg, and there is also a Forbidden Zerg commander level fighting with the Styx Emperor in the air.

"Forbidden Zerg!"

King Shi said in surprise.

"That's right, it's the Forbidden Zerg!" said the Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace.

"Qinglong Palace Master, didn't you say that there was a forbidden zerg near the mountain boundary?" said the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor in a deep voice.

"Yes, and it's the Dark Forbidden Domain area that is not very far from here, everyone is a half-step domain ancestor, and they should all know some secrets, about the Forbidden Zerg, I won't introduce it! Once they are allowed to develop and invade the Daoshan Realm, it will be a big trouble! According to the understanding of the Domain Ancestors, there are quite a few realms in the Dark Forbidden Domain that are destroyed in the hands of the Forbidden Zerg. "

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord reminded.

"What does the Imperial Palace mean that day?"

Heavenly Brahman Dao Ancestor asked.

"All the forces unite and set up teleportation arrays to reach the edge of the Dark Forbidden Domain, to hunt the Forbidden Zerg, and strive to kill the Forbidden Zerg, if they can destroy the Forbidden Zerg's lair, it would be better!"

"Seconded!"

"Seconded!"

"Seconded!"

The other half-step domain ancestors agreed.

The Forbidden Zerg is indeed a great danger, once they continue to reproduce and do not restrict their growth, they can even destroy the Domain Ancestor in the future, they dare not let the Forbidden Zerg grow.

Otherwise, the Dao Mountain Realm was gone, and they would not have the confidence to continue to wander through the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Next, the three Nine Heavens forces and the Black Wind Mountain also sent Dao Ancestors to the Dark Forbidden Domain to investigate, and they did find the Forbidden Zerg, so they no longer had any doubts.

Subsequently, they contacted one by one the Upper Triple Heaven forces, and then those Upper Triple Heaven forces contacted the Middle Triple Heaven Forces and the Lower Triple Heaven Forces, explaining the dangers and situations of the Forbidden Zerg one by one.

Suddenly, all the forces in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm were panicked, and they were also preparing to send people to intercept the Forbidden Zerg.

Terran.

Ye Tian learned about the Forbidden Zerg and ended his retreat cultivation.

"Forbidden Zerg, I didn't expect there to be such a terrifying race near the Daoshan Realm!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

In terms of news and intelligence, the strength of the Forbidden Zerg is extremely terrifying, and the reproduction speed is very fast.

In terms of strength, the Taboo Zerg is divided into ordinary Zerg, elite Zerg, Commander-level Zerg and Lord-level Zerg.

The strength of ordinary Zerg is equivalent to that of Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor to Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, elite Zerg is equivalent to Supreme Dao Ancestor, commander-level Zerg is equivalent to Invincible Dao Ancestor, and Lord-level Zerg is equivalent to Half-step Domain Ancestor.

It is rumored that the Forbidden Zerg also has a level of Zerg - the Worm King!

Once the Worm King level Zerg is born, it can be comparable to the domain ancestor-level powerhouse!

It can be said that once this Zerg nest gives birth to the Worm King, then the Daoshan Realm will be completely finished.

Subsequently, Ye Tian conveyed to the entire human race that anyone who has cultivated to the strength of the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor or above can participate in the battle to intercept the Forbidden Zerg, but it is not compulsory.

And he, he must go to war!
